action_table.cyber_critical: Change all passwords immediately. Enable two-factor authentication on all accounts. Check bank and credit card statements for unauthorized transactions. File a report with your local cybercrime unit.
action_table.cyber_moderate: Review recent login activity on mentioned accounts. Update passwords for affected services. Monitor your statements for the next 30 days.
action_table.cyber_informational: Be aware of this reported scam. Do not click unfamiliar links. No immediate action required.
action_table.criminal_critical: Call 911 immediately if not already done. Do not approach or intervene. Lock doors, stay inside, and await official all-clear.
action_table.criminal_moderate: Report to local police non-emergency line if not already reported. Secure your property. Review security camera footage if available.
action_table.criminal_informational: Incident logged for community awareness. No immediate action needed. Stay alert in the reported area.
action_table.infrastructure_critical: Evacuate the area if directed by authorities. Avoid the affected zone. Contact your utility provider's emergency line.
action_table.infrastructure_moderate: Avoid the affected area. Check your utility provider's status page for updates. Report to 311 if not already reported.
action_table.infrastructure_informational: Minor infrastructure issue noted. No immediate impact expected. Report to 311 if it worsens.
action_table.suspicious_critical: Do not approach. Call 911 if activity appears threatening. Lock doors and stay inside.
action_table.suspicious_moderate: Note details (vehicle plate, physical description, time). Report to police non-emergency line. Alert immediate neighbors.
action_table.suspicious_informational: Activity logged for community awareness. Stay alert but no action required.
action_table.health_critical: Follow official advisories immediately. Seal windows if air quality issue. Use bottled water if water advisory. Seek medical attention if symptomatic.
action_table.health_moderate: Monitor local health department updates. Limit exposure to affected area. Seek medical advice if you experience symptoms.
action_table.health_informational: Health advisory noted. No immediate risk reported. Monitor for updates.
action_table.uncategorized_critical: Review report details and assess personal risk. Contact local authorities if you believe you are affected.
action_table.uncategorized_moderate: Report logged for community review. No specific action recommended at this time.
action_table.uncategorized_informational: Report logged for community awareness. No action required.
